description: Search, compare, and analyze U.S. college data — costs, earnings, programs, and outcomes.

interface.shortDescription: Search, compare, and analyze U.S. college data — costs, earnings, programs, and outcomes.
interface.longDescription: Access U.S. Department of Education College Scorecard data — search institutions, compare schools side-by-side, look up program-level earnings and debt, and analyze value metrics.
